meaning: n.单一,异常,奇异,奇妙,稀有
examples: It would be wonderful to observe a singularity and obtain direct evidence of the undoubtedly bizarre phenomena that occur near one.
What Will the Singularity Look Like?
Singularity is almost invariably a clue.
Technological singularity refers to the hypothetical future emergence of greater-than-human intelligence through technological means.
Speaking of Singularity, it and other new entrants in higher education are already disrupting the rules.
